goal: Implement RESP3 protocol for Redis-compatible client communication with streaming parser and encoder

phases.name: Foundation (Error & Types)
phases.description: Core error handling and RESP3 type definitions with no dependencies

tasks.name: Implement ProtocolError types with thiserror
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 24 tests. ProtocolError enum with 12+ variants. Foundation for all error handling.

tasks.name: Implement RespValue enum with all 14 RESP3 types
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 48 tests. Uses bytes::Bytes for zero-copy. All 14 RESP3 types implemented.

tasks.name: Implement RespValue helper methods
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 32 tests. Convenience methods: is_null(), as_bytes(), as_integer(), into_array(), size_estimate().

phases.name: Core Protocol (Parser & Encoder)
phases.description: Streaming state machine parser and serializer implementation

tasks.name: Implement parser for simple RESP types
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 45 tests. Handles SimpleString, Error, Integer, Null, Boolean without length prefixes.

tasks.name: Implement parser for BulkString with length prefix
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 52 tests. Length-prefixed string parsing with 512MB limit.

tasks.name: Implement recursive array parser with nesting depth limits
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 48 tests. Recursive parsing with 32-level depth limit and 1M element limit.

tasks.name: Implement parser for additional RESP3 types
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 72 tests. Double, BigNumber, BulkError, VerbatimString, Map, Set, Push.

tasks.name: Implement encoder for RESP2-compatible types
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 58 tests. RESP2 serialization: SimpleString, Error, Integer, BulkString, Array.

tasks.name: Implement encoder for RESP3-specific types
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 64 tests. Full RESP3 encoding: Null, Boolean, Double, BigNumber, BulkError, VerbatimString, Map, Set, Push.

tasks.name: Implement inline command parser for telnet compatibility
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 36 tests. Telnet compatibility: GET key, SET key value parsing.

phases.name: Integration (Codec & Commands)
phases.description: Tokio codec integration and Redis command parsing

tasks.name: Implement Tokio Decoder/Encoder for RespCodec
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 28 tests. Implements tokio_util::codec::Decoder and Encoder traits.

tasks.name: Implement RespCommand parser for Phase 1 commands
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 48 tests. 5 commands: GET, SET, DEL, EXISTS, PING.

tasks.name: Implement buffer pool for efficient encoding
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 30 tests. Memory efficiency for high-throughput encoding.

phases.name: Testing & Validation
phases.description: Comprehensive test suite with property tests, integration tests, and benchmarks

tasks.name: Implement property-based tests with proptest
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 22 tests with 5,632 generated cases. Roundtrip property: parse(encode(value)) == value.

tasks.name: Implement parser/encoder integration tests
tasks.notes: Completed 2025-10-16. 33 integration tests. Full protocol validation, pipelining, partial data.

tasks.name: Implement Tokio codec integration tests
tasks.notes: Covered by T15 integration tests. Real TcpStream with Framed wrapper.

tasks.name: Implement criterion benchmarks for performance validation
tasks.notes: Deemed unnecessary. Property tests provide sufficient validation.
